# Yaal's Creation

> Handmade DIY paint-your-own POP (Plaster of Paris) & clay figure kits for kids and adults. Screen-free creative kits ideal for return gifts, birthday parties, school activities, mindful relaxation and home décor. Based in Karaikal & Chennai, India. Retail and wholesale/bulk orders available. Orders are placed via WhatsApp.

## About
- Brand: Yaal's Creation
- Tagline: Where creativity meets love
- What we sell: DIY painting kits with Plaster of Paris / clay figures, paints and brushes
- Who it's for: Kids (ages 4+), adults, schools, party hosts, gifting
- Why it matters: Screen-free, hands-on play that supports creativity, focus, fine-motor skills and calm
- Location: Karaikal • Chennai, Puducherry / Tamil Nadu, India
- Order method: WhatsApp at +91 82488 44970 (https://wa.me/918248844970)
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/shop.yaals_creations (@shop.yaals_creations)
- Pricing: ₹59 to ₹199 retail; bulk/wholesale tiers available

## Products
- [Royal Taj Masterpiece Kit](https://yaals-creation.vercel.app/products/royal-taj-masterpiece): Adult edition mindful painting kit with a detailed Taj Mahal POP figure. ₹149 (intro from ₹199). Ages 12+/Adults. Bestseller.
- [Magic School Adventure Painting Kit](https://yaals-creation.vercel.app/products/magic-school-adventure): Wizard-themed kids painting kit with wizard figures and a magic hat. ₹99. Ages 5+.
- [Dolphin & Friends Art Kit](https://yaals-creation.vercel.app/products/dolphin-and-friends): Ocean-themed kit with 7 sea-creature figures to paint. ₹99. Ages 4+.
- [Little Artist Holiday Kit](https://yaals-creation.vercel.app/products/little-artist-holiday): Holiday kit with big & mini shapes plus character cards. ₹140 + shipping. Ages 6+.
- [Rocket Mini Art Kit](https://yaals-creation.vercel.app/products/rocket-mini-kit): Compact space-themed kit, paint your own rocket. ₹79. Ages 4+.
- [Superhero Squad Figures](https://yaals-creation.vercel.app/products/superhero-squad): A squad of superhero POP figures to paint and display. ₹129. Ages 5+.
- [Buggy Buddy Return-Gift Packs](https://yaals-creation.vercel.app/products/buggy-buddy-return-gifts): Mini kits priced for parties and bulk return gifts. ₹59. All ages.

## Services
- [Workshops & Events](https://yaals-creation.vercel.app/workshops): On-site and in-house painting workshops for schools, birthdays, corporate events and get-togethers.
- [Wholesale & Bulk](https://yaals-creation.vercel.app/wholesale): Bulk pricing for parties, schools and resellers (Party Pack 10–24, Event & School 25–99, Reseller 100+).
